rulings.Case Title: PAUL O'GRADY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Defendant City And County Of San Francisco Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 17, 2020 line DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Amended Notice Of Defendant City And County Of San Francisco Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is GRANTED. As to the cause of action for inverse condemnation motion is granted with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege what property belonging Plaintiff was taking. Motion is granted with leave to amend as to all other causes of action to allege in good faith statutory basis for liability against a public entity.=(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THEODORAS KOLIATSIS VS. CURRY PARKWAY, LP ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 17, 2020 line DEFENDANT CURRY PARKWAY, L.P. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action is OFF CALEDANR. Notice of Withdrawal of Notice of Pendency of Action filed on January 15, 2020.
